use.flag: Enable Brotli compression support via app-arch/brotli
Enable asynchronous DNS resolution via net-dns/c-ares
Enable coroutine-based HTTP client using PHP's curl extension and net-misc/curl
Enable io_uring async I/O backend via sys-libs/liburing
Enable interoperability with PHP's sockets extension for socket handle sharing
Enable Zstandard compression support via app-arch/zstd
